title: Long Lines for Gas Shatter the Illusion of Normalcy in Wartime Russia
summary_full: “Are we in the Soviet Union now?” asked one Russian, stunned and frustrated by the waits at the pumps.
summary_public: “Are we in the Soviet Union now?” asked one Russian, stunned and frustrated by the waits at the pumps.
